channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Home Office Selects IBM to Upgrade Britain’s Emergency Services Network (ESN)
item.description: The Home Office has confirmed that IBM will be delivering the UK's Emergency Services Network (ESN) upgrade, including police forces, fire services, and ambulance trusts. The project aims to provide faster access to data, real-time video, and secure voice communications for over 300,000 emergency responders.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
